message:
fix: add bounds checking for int32 conversion in replicas param (#3691) (#3740)

The gosec scanner flagged an integer overflow risk where strconv.Atoi
returns an int that was directly cast to int32 without validation.
Add explicit bounds checking against math.MinInt32/MaxInt32 and
proper error handling for invalid input.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
